title: Japanese Okonomiyaki with Pomegranate Glaze
description: A twist on the classic Japanese savory pancake, topped with a sweet and tangy pomegranate glaze.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Okonomiyaki Sauce, Soy Sauce (if using), and Sesame Seeds (if using).
Add crumbled tofu, minced ginger, and shredded cabbage to the bowl. Mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan or okonomiyaki pan over medium heat.
Pour the batter into the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the pancake and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the other side is also golden brown.
While the pancake is cooking, prepare the Pomegranate Glaze (see below).
Once the pancake is cooked, brush the Pomegranate Glaze on top.
